title: hedyotis fraterna
intro: Hedyotis fraterna, also known as Lian Yang Ji or Fraterna Hedyotis, is a perennial herb native to China and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood pressure, and alleviating symptoms of fever and digestive issues. Hedyotis fraterna is often prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
